LSE-MS7-L4-1400P-MSMATH7-PPX-NAV-02  |  MS Math: Grade 7  |  Percent Problems  |  Pen-Pal Exchange  |  North American Voices

The Vermont Reply

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What does the girl need to figure out?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the girl is trying to figure out, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what she says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about why she needs that information before she can respond.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.B.5  |  CCSS 7.RP.A.3  |  MS Math Grade 7: Percent Problems
